tools.name: scan_network
tools.description: Scan network for WeMo devices using pywemo discovery. Probes all IPs in the subnet on common WeMo ports (49152-49155), verifies responsive IPs, and uses the pywemo library to identify and parse WeMo devices.

timeout.description: Connection timeout in seconds for port probing (default: 0.6)

max_workers.description: Maximum concurrent workers for network scanning (default: 60)

tools.name: list_devices
tools.description: List all discovered WeMo devices from the cache. Returns a list of devices found in previous network scans.

tools.name: get_device_status
tools.description: Get the current state and information for a specific WeMo device by name or IP address.

device_identifier.description: Device name (e.g., "Office Light") or IP address (e.g., "192.168.1.100")

tools.name: control_device
tools.description: Control a WeMo device — turn it on, off, toggle it, or adjust brightness for dimmers.

device_identifier.description: Device name (e.g., "Office Light") or IP address

action.description: Action to perform on the device

brightness.description: Brightness level 1-100 (only for 'brightness' action on dimmers)

tools.name: rename_device
tools.description: Rename a WeMo device, changing its friendly name in both the cache and on the device itself.

device_identifier.description: Current device name or IP address

new_name.description: New friendly name for the device

tools.name: get_homekit_code
tools.description: Get the HomeKit setup code for a WeMo device. Not all devices support HomeKit.

device_identifier.description: Device name (e.g., "Office Light") or IP address (e.g., "192.168.1.100")

tools.name: get_cache_info
tools.description: Get information about the persistent device cache, including age, expiration status, and number of devices stored.

tools.name: clear_cache
tools.description: Clear both the persistent and in-memory device cache. After clearing, run scan_network to rebuild.

tools.name: get_configuration
tools.description: Get the current server configuration as JSON, including network parameters, cache settings, and logging levels.

resources.name: Device Index
resources.description: JSON index of all cached WeMo devices

resources.name: Device State
resources.description: Live state for a specific device (name or IP, URL-encoded)

prompts.name: discover-devices
prompts.description: Guided network scan with subnet selection

prompts.name: device-status-report
prompts.description: Summary report of all device states

prompts.name: activate-scene
prompts.description: Control multiple devices as a scene
